name: CEPS PLC
summary: CEPS PLC operates as an industrial holding company in the United Kingdom. It operates through Aford Awards, CEM Press, Davies Odell, Friedman's, and Hickton segments. The Aford Awards segment offers sports trophies and engraving services. The CEM Press segment manufactures fabric, carpet, wallpaper pattern books, swatches, and shade cards. The Davies Odell segment manufacturers and sells protection equipment, matting, and footwear components. The Friedman's segment converts and distributes Lycra. The Hickton segment provides services to the construction industry. CEPS PLC was founded in 2004 and is based in Bath, the United Kingdom.
